# @stronger-ecommerce/smartkart-api - Full Reference

Typed TypeScript client for the SmartKart (RDT Connectors) point-of-sale API. Designed for use in Node 18+, modern browsers, Bun, Cloudflare Workers, and Gadget apps.

## Install

```bash
npm install @stronger-ecommerce/smartkart-api
```

## Construction

```ts
import { SmartKartClient } from "@stronger-ecommerce/smartkart-api";

const sk = new SmartKartClient({
  token: process.env.SMARTKART_API_TOKEN!, // sent as the `Token` header on every request
  defaultStoreId: 42,                      // optional fallback storeID
  baseUrl: "http://rdtapi.com/RDTConnectrosAPI", // default; note typo matches upstream
  defaultTimeoutMs: 30_000,                // default 30s; 0 disables
  retry: { attempts: 3, baseDelayMs: 250, maxDelayMs: 5_000 }, // default
  logger: { debug: console.debug, warn: console.warn },        // optional
  fetch: customFetch,                      // optional (defaults to globalThis.fetch)
  defaultHeaders: { "X-Trace": "abc" },    // optional, attached to every request
  endpoints: { getItems: "/api/v2/GetItems" }, // optional path overrides
});
```

`token` is required. Throws synchronously if missing or if no fetch implementation is available.

## SmartKartClientOptions

| Field              | Type                              | Default                           | Notes                                              |
| ------------------ | --------------------------------- | --------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| `token`            | `string`                          | required                          | Sent as the `Token` header.                        |
| `baseUrl`          | `string`                          | `DEFAULT_BASE_URL`                | Trailing slashes are stripped.                     |
| `fetch`            | `FetchLike`                       | `globalThis.fetch`                | Pass a polyfill on older Node or for testing.      |
| `defaultStoreId`   | `number`                          | -                                 | Used when a request omits `storeID`.               |
| `endpoints`        | `Partial<typeof ENDPOINTS>`       | `ENDPOINTS`                       | Per-method path override.                          |
| `defaultHeaders`   | `Record<string, string>`          | `{}`                              | Merged into every request.                         |
| `defaultTimeoutMs` | `number`                          | `30000`                           | `0` disables timeouts.                             |
| `retry`            | `RetryOptions \| false`           | `{ attempts: 3, ... }`            | `false` disables retries entirely.                 |
| `logger`           | `Logger`                          | -                                 | `{ debug?, warn? }`. Compatible with `console`.    |

## Per-request `RequestOptions`

Every public method accepts an optional final argument of type `RequestOptions`:

| Field       | Type                       | Notes                                                          |
| ----------- | -------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `signal`    | `AbortSignal`              | Cancellation. Honoured immediately if already aborted.         |
| `timeoutMs` | `number`                   | Override default. Pass `0` to disable for this request only.   |
| `retry`     | `RetryOptions \| false`    | Per-request override. `false` disables retries for this call.  |
| `logger`    | `Logger`                   | Per-request logger override.                                   |

`RetryOptions`:

| Field          | Type                                                    | Default                                  |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| `attempts`     | `number`                                                | `3`                                      |
| `baseDelayMs`  | `number`                                                | `250`                                    |
| `maxDelayMs`   | `number`                                                | `5000`                                   |
| `retryOn`      | `(info) => boolean`                                     | retries on `0`, `408`, `425`, `429`, 5xx |

Backoff is `min(maxDelayMs, baseDelayMs * 2^(attempt-1) + random*baseDelayMs)`.

## Methods

### `getItems(input, options?) -> Promise<PaginatedData<Item>>`

```ts
const page = await sk.getItems({
  pageSize: 100,
  pageNumber: 1,
  itemsFilter: {
    // storeID optional — falls back to client's defaultStoreId
    itemStatus: "Active",                  // "Active" | "Inactive" | null
    lastDateModified: "2026-01-01T00:00:00",
  },
});
```

Returns `{ totalRecords, recordsFiltered, pageSize, currentPage, records: Item[] }`. Each `Item` has explicit fields for documented properties (`itemID`, `name`, `upc`, `parent`, `customFields`, ...) and an index signature so undocumented fields are surfaced rather than dropped.

### `getAllItems(filter?, options?) -> AsyncIterableIterator<Item>`

Streams every matching item across pages. Stops when a page returns fewer records than `pageSize` or `maxPages` is hit.

```ts
for await (const item of sk.getAllItems({ itemStatus: "Active" })) {
  console.log(item.itemID);
}
```

`options` extends `RequestOptions` with: `pageSize` (default 100), `startPage` (default 1), `maxPages` (optional safety cap).

### `createPhoneOrder(input, options?) -> Promise<{ phoneOrderNo: string }>`

```ts
const { phoneOrderNo } = await sk.createPhoneOrder({
  customerNo: "(123)456-7890",
  firstName: "John",
  lastName: "Doe",
  address: { phone1: "(718)782-4608" },           // camelCase
  CustomerShippingAddress: [                       // PascalCase keys (intentional)
    { Address1: "1234 5th ave", City: "Brooklyn", State: "NY", ZipCode: "11201" },
  ],
  phoneOrderType: "MyApp",
  TakenBy: "jdoe",
  Shift: "Day",
  tenderName: "MyApp",
  orderDetails: [
    { barCode: "0376", qty: 2, uomType: UomType.Standard, sortOrder: 1 },
    { barCode: "894792002959", qty: 1, uomType: UomType.Case, sortOrder: 2 },
  ],
});
```

The PascalCase / camelCase split on `address` vs `CustomerShippingAddress` is upstream-mandated. The types preserve it so the wire payload is correct.

### `getCustomers(input, options?) -> Promise<PaginatedData<Customer>>`

```ts
const page = await sk.getCustomers({
  pageSize: 50,
  pageNumber: 1,
  customerFilter: { customerNo: "(718)782-4608" },
});
```

`Customer` is fully typed including nested `addresses`, `customerNotes`, `groups`, and `creditCardTokens`.

### `getAllCustomers(filter?, options?) -> AsyncIterableIterator<Customer>`

```ts
for await (const c of sk.getAllCustomers({ lastName: "Doe" })) {
  console.log(c.customerNo);
}
```

### `post<T>(path, body, options?) -> Promise<T>`

Lower-level helper exposed for forward-compatibility if SmartKart adds an endpoint that isn't wrapped here. Honours all `RequestOptions`.

## Error handling

All failure modes throw `SmartKartApiError`:

| `status`  | Cause                                                  |
| --------- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
| `0`       | Network error or timeout (check `apiDescription`).     |
| `4xx`     | Client-side HTTP error (incl. envelope on body).       |
| `5xx`     | Server-side HTTP error.                                |
| `>= 200`  | API returned `success: false` despite 2xx.             |

```ts
import { SmartKartApiError, isSmartKartApiError } from "@stronger-ecommerce/smartkart-api";

try {
  await sk.getItems({ pageSize: 30, pageNumber: 1, itemsFilter: {} });
} catch (err) {
  if (isSmartKartApiError(err)) {
    // err.status, err.endpoint, err.apiDescription, err.apiErrors, err.rawBody
  } else {
    throw err;
  }
}
```

Always prefer `isSmartKartApiError(err)` over `err instanceof SmartKartApiError` because dual ESM/CJS module graphs and worker boundaries can break `instanceof`.

## Cancellation

```ts
const ac = new AbortController();
setTimeout(() => ac.abort("user cancelled"), 5_000);

await sk.getItems(req, { signal: ac.signal });
```

Aborting between retry attempts is honoured — the loop exits immediately.

## Logging

```ts
const sk = new SmartKartClient({
  token: "...",
  logger: {
    debug: (msg, meta) => console.debug(`[smartkart] ${msg}`, meta),
    warn: (msg, meta) => console.warn(`[smartkart] ${msg}`, meta),
  },
});
```

Emitted events: `smartkart request`, `smartkart request failed, retrying`, `smartkart request succeeded after retry`.

## Constants

- `DEFAULT_BASE_URL = "http://rdtapi.com/RDTConnectrosAPI"` — note the typo, it's intentional and matches upstream.
- `DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS = 30000`
- `DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 100`
- `ENDPOINTS = { getItems, createPhoneOrder, getCustomers }`
- `UomType.Standard = 0`, `UomType.Case = 2`
- `CustomerNoteType` — `"0"` Internal, `"1"` ForCustomer, `"2"` ForCashier, `"3"` PhoneOrder, `"4"` All
- `CustomerAddressType.Main = 6`

## Type exports

`Item`, `ItemsFilter`, `ItemsFilterInput`, `GetItemsRequest`, `GetItemsInput`, `GetItemsResponse`, `ItemStatus`, `ItemCustomField`, `Customer`, `CustomerFilter`, `GetCustomersRequest`, `GetCustomersResponse`, `CustomerAddress`, `CustomerNote`, `CustomerGroup`, `CreditCardToken`, `CustomerStatus`, `CreatePhoneOrderRequest`, `CreatePhoneOrderInput`, `CreatePhoneOrderData`, `CreatePhoneOrderResponse`, `PhoneOrderAddress`, `PhoneOrderShippingAddress`, `PhoneOrderDetail`, `ApiResponse`, `PaginatedData`, `PaginatedRequestBase`, `IsoDateTime`, `RequestOptions`, `RetryOptions`, `PaginationOptions`, `Logger`, `SmartKartClientOptions`, `FetchLike`.
